name: Issyk-Kul
fact: One of the world's largest alpine lakes and the second-largest saline lake after the Caspian Sea. It is surrounded by the Tian Shan mountains and is a major tourist destination.

name: Song-Köl
fact: A beautiful high-mountain lake famous for its summer pastures, traditional yurts, and nomadic culture.

name: Chatyr-Köl
fact: A high-altitude lake located near the Torugart Pass, known for its clear waters and remote mountain scenery.

name: Sary-Chelek
fact: A stunning alpine lake surrounded by forests and mountains, located in the Sary-Chelek Biosphere Reserve.

name: Kel-Suu
fact: A remote turquoise mountain lake famous for its dramatic cliffs, hidden valleys, and breathtaking scenery.

name: Ala-Köl
fact: A high-altitude glacial lake in the Tian Shan mountains, popular among hikers for its crystal-clear blue waters and mountain views.
